channel.title: Gcd on Jasper's Technical Notebook
channel.description: Recent content in Gcd on Jasper's Technical Notebook

item.title: Number Theory #1: Elementary Number Theory — GCD, LCM, Euler, CRT
item.description: GCD/LCM properties, Bézout/Frobenius coin problem, Euler’s theorem with power-tower reduction, φ-chain, CRT, congruence system merging, n! prime factorisation.
